backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing calculator UI, behavior, accessibility, and theme features with associated files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing one-line summaries for various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining theme color variables, dark mode overrides, and global styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the CalculatorPage.
frontend/src/components/calculator/Calcu: Display component showing the calculator value with error styling and ARIA attributes.
Calculator keypad component defining button layout, handlers, styling, and accessibility labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor with query caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalculatorEngine.t: State machine implementing immediate-execution calculator logic, including chaining, repeated equals, and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and custom OKLCH theme variables for light/dark modes and applies global base styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and InternetIdentityProvider and mounts App with global styles.
frontend/src/pages/CalculatorPage.tsx: Renders the calculator layout, wires keypad/display to calculator engine hooks, and adds full keyboard support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom color variables, typography, animations, and plugins for the app theme.
project_state.json: Contains the project's state, feature list, and metadata for the mobile-friendly calculator app.
